candidate_grammar.boundary: All finite quantum-information support correspondences generated from the two held Fold labels, canonical word positions, complete branch support, bijective basis names, pair-cell composition and total observation classes.
candidate_grammar.generator: Generate the complete product of native unit, word support, basis correspondence, branch provenance, superposition boundary, joint support, observation record, reconstruction, generality and extra-quantum status.

excluded_inputs: no complex, irrational or imaginary proof value
no interference, entanglement or gate semantics claimed at the support boundary
intended_certificate: Independent regeneration of the complete 1024-candidate product, its sole all-preserving survivor, closure properties and controls.
statement: One Fold distinction supplies the native information unit. Across k canonical positions, the complete generated held-label word family supplies the exact branch support corresponding to a finite quantum basis support, and complete pair cells supply joint-state support. Calling this support superposition-equivalent asserts equality of enumerated alternatives and provenance only: amplitudes, phase and dynamics are not imported. Observation returns an exact retained branch class and a complete reconstruction record. Thus classical held states, probabilistic observation classes and quantum basis support share one exact information carrier at this boundary.
title: Exact quantum-information support correspondence
